metadata.description: Product on Purpose: thematic AI agent skill and tool collections for product work.

plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: Product management skills, sub-agents, and sprint tools across the full product lifecycle. Follows the agentskills.io specification.

plugins.name: thinking-framework-skills
plugins.description: Evidence-graded, agent-executable thinking-method skills: each is reduced to its working mechanism, graded honestly on its evidence, and produces a concrete artifact. Includes a published Framework Library, a research engine, and routing/applicator tools. Follows the agentskills.io specification.

plugins.name: writing-style-catalog
plugins.description: Composable writing instructions on four orthogonal axes (Voice, Tone, Style, Format). Select one entry per axis and the compose-instruction skill assembles a ready-to-paste prompt prefix that steers any LLM toward a precise register, reasoning pattern, and layout. Ships 60 curated entries (15 per axis), 195 worked examples across three anchor topics, 12 diff-pairs, and 5 horizontal-slice recipes. Follows the agentskills.io specification.

plugins.name: agent-skills-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit and Standard for authoring, validating, governing, and scaling cross-agent skill libraries (Claude Code and Codex) to a tiered Bronze/Silver/Gold quality bar. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
